title: chrysanthellum keilii
intro: Chrysanthellum keilii, also known as Florida filaree or dwarf verbena, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Chrysanthellum keilii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthellum keilii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or alcohol.
